title: IT Project Executive
description:
We are expanding our Project Team searching for dynamic individuals who are keen in managing and delivering enterprise-level systems. The applying candidates should be able to demonstrate creativity in deriving solutions for different project/scenarios as well as being proficient in the software development life cycle. Selected candidates can look forward to attractive income, potential and rewarding career prospects plus growth opportunities.

The Challenge:

  • Work with stakeholders to define project goals, objectives, and deliverables.
  • Develop detailed project plans, schedules, and timelines for tasks.     
  • Identify and assign the necessary resources, including personnel, equipment, and budget.
  • Monitoring project progress and timeline and be able to navigate around unforeseen delays or setbacks.
  • Track project progress against project plans and adjust where necessary.
  • Ensures all project documentation are completed, updated, and archived appropriately.
  • Serve as the main point of contact, keeping stakeholders, clients, and team managers informed.
  • Prepare and present reports on project progress, problems, and solutions.
  • Develop test scripts for both System Integration Testing (SIT) and User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
  • Elicit, analyze, and document business and technical requirements from stakeholders.
  • Collaborating with stakeholders to gather, translate and prioritize requirements.
  • Document and log incidents then create trends to monitor the progress and health of a project/system.
  • Conduct impact assessment on Change Requests to understand the purpose of the change, assess if it is aligned with the direction/aim of the System, then advise accordingly.
  • Work with respective teams to create the Scope of Works and quote accordingly.


Requirements:

  • Degree/Diploma in Information Technology/Computer Science or related disciplines.
  • 1 years' Project Management experience in IT web application-based projects.
  • 1 year experience in Enterprise Content Management (CMS) systems like Sitefinity, SharePoint, or Sitecore.
  • Hands on experience performing content inventory and content stock take activities.
  • Some exposure to full project development life cycle using Agile methodology.
  • Strong analytical, conceptualization and interpersonal ability.
  • Strong presentation skills, both written and verbal, to positively influence key stakeholders.
  • Pleasant personality & strong sense of responsibility and ownership.
  • Proficient in the use of MS Office for Project Management (MS Excel, MS PowerPoint, MS Word, MS Visio, MS Project)
  • More experienced candidates will be considered for senior positions.

Certification in the following areas will be advantageous:

  • Agile related certifications like Certified SCRUM Master.
  • Enterprise CMS certifications like SharePoint Administrator, Sitefinity Administrator.


Experience in the following will be advantageous:

  • Developing frontend solutions using languages like HTML, CSS, Javascript.
  • Developing ASP.NET Core solutions.
  • Planning and execution of content and data migration.


Due to the nature of this job role, the incumbent is required to be onsite during fixed hours.

postedCompany.description:
Since 2007, Simple Solution Systems Pte Ltd (“SIMSYS”) has been a leading IT solution and service provider based in Singapore. Our robust Enterprise Software Solutions and systems are setup in a wide range of environments from Small Business Systems to Enterprise Class N-Tier Architecture Environments. Our emphasis is in the quality of the design solutions that meet the most stringent performance and security requirements.

At SIMSYS we are at the forefront of Enterprise Application Development. Our clientele are mainly from the Government Sector as well as large Multi National Corporations and Financial institutions who have the highest demand in high performance Enterprise Applications. Underpinning everything we do, is the firm belief that technology should positively impact the lives of people. We work hand in hand with our clients to improve business efficiency, resiliency and removing technology roadblocks.

We leverage on the latest technofixes to deliver our solutions from cloud native docker container applications to advanced DEVOPS delivery solutions to ensure high performance and security to our clients.

@SIMSYS, we believe that our people are our assets. Thus, we are committed to nurturing talents in developing creative and innovative solutions. We believe in creating an environment that fosters strong team spirit and respects individuality and autonomy.

If you are passionate about new cloud based web & mobile technologies and dynamic new ways improving the IT landscape, we welcome you to be part of our growing team!
postedCompany.name: SIMPLE SOLUTION SYSTEMS PTE. LTD.
